_comment: Add these keys to your VS Code settings.json to point Cline at KeylessAI.
_how_to_use: Open VS Code > Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+P > 'Preferences: Open User Settings (JSON)' > paste these keys into the top-level object. Restart Cline.
_roo_code_equivalent: Roo Code uses 'roo-cline.' prefix instead of 'cline.' — same keys otherwise.
